2021-esp.keyEvent: Pitted on lap 42 for fresh softs to undercut Verstappen.
2021-esp.telemetrySummary: Consistent lap times in the 1:21s before the final stop.

2021-abu.keyEvent: Pitted on lap 53 for fresh softs under the Nicholas Latifi safety car.
2021-abu.telemetrySummary: Massive pace delta on the final lap due to tire compound advantage.
